prompt: Create a clean editorial illustration for a portfolio project card about Skedra, an SMS-first AI scheduling assistant for assisted living facilities. style: clean editorial illustration, modern product-style artwork, soft baby-blue palette, subtle gradients, restrained detail, premium startup feel

lighting: soft diffuse light, calm and polished mood
constraints: no logos, no watermarks, no readable text, no purple bias, not photorealistic, avoid clutter
